title: cytisanthus sessilifolius
intro: Cytisanthus sessilifolius, also known as the 'hairy ball', is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cytisanthus sessilifolius are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a poultice or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
